title: Dead Channel Protocol - Compromised Truth Ending Card
prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Ending card for "Compromised Truth" (PYRRHIC). Summary: You neutralize the app but trigger cascading outages and civic panic.. Deliver emotional closure with sequel-hook tension.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
